paper_title: Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces sparse expert layers with dynamic routing, achieving efficient scaling to large parameter counts while maintaining computational efficiency through expert parallelism.
raw_extraction.application: Natural language processing, multilingual learning, language modeling, downstream fine-tuning (reasoning, knowledge-heavy tasks)
raw_extraction.license: Closed source (not explicitly stated, inferred from context)
raw_extraction.extension: Dynamic expert routing enables efficient scaling to large models with minimal communication overhead during training.
raw_extraction.paper_title: Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity

raw_extraction.innovation: Scaled-up version of Switch-Base with increased model capacity, leveraging expert parallelism for efficient training.
raw_extraction.application: Natural language processing, multilingual learning, language modeling, downstream fine-tuning (reasoning, knowledge-heavy tasks)
raw_extraction.license: Closed source (not explicitly stated, inferred from context)
raw_extraction.extension: Increased number of layers and expert capacity relative to Switch-Base, maintaining FLOP-matching with T5-Large.
raw_extraction.paper_title: Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity

raw_extraction.innovation: FLOP-matched to T5-XXL but with sparse expert layers, demonstrating superior sample efficiency and reduced training instability.
raw_extraction.application: Natural language processing, multilingual learning, language modeling, downstream fine-tuning (reasoning, knowledge-heavy tasks)
raw_extraction.license: Closed source (not explicitly stated, inferred from context)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scaling neural language models to trillions of parameters with efficient sparsity while maintaining performance and stability.
raw_extraction.extension: Combines expert parallelism with model parallelism for handling extremely large parameter counts while maintaining computational efficiency.
raw_extraction.paper_title: Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity

raw_extraction.innovation: Trillion-parameter model designed primarily with expert parallelism, achieving high efficiency and stability even at extreme scales.
raw_extraction.application: Natural language processing, multilingual learning, language modeling, downstream fine-tuning (reasoning, knowledge-heavy tasks)
raw_extraction.license: Closed source (not explicitly stated, inferred from context)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scaling neural language models to trillions of parameters with efficient sparsity while maintaining performance and stability.
raw_extraction.extension: Utilizes only expert parallelism with 2048 experts, avoiding model parallelism to simplify training and reduce communication overhead.
raw_extraction.paper_title: Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces **Mixture of Experts (MoE)** within Transformer feed-forward layers, replacing dense layers with sparse, dynamic computation paths to scale efficiently to trillions of parameters.
raw_extraction.application: Natural language understanding, question answering, multi-task learning, and knowledge-based tasks (Natural Questions, WebQuestions, TriviaQA).
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scaling neural language models to trillions of parameters with efficient sparsity while maintaining performance and stability.
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Multi-task fine-tuning (including SuperGLUE, ANLI, closed-book QA)
raw_extraction.extension: No-Token-Left-Behind routing protocol to prevent token dropping during training/inference.
raw_extraction.paper_title: Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity

raw_extraction.innovation: **Dynamic expert routing** enables efficient scaling to 175B parameters by activating only a subset of experts per token, reducing compute cost while preserving performance.
raw_extraction.application: Natural language understanding, question answering, multi-task learning, and knowledge-based tasks (Natural Questions, WebQuestions, TriviaQA).
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scaling neural language models to trillions of parameters with efficient sparsity while maintaining performance and stability.
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Multi-task fine-tuning (including SuperGLUE, ANLI, closed-book QA).
raw_extraction.extension: Input jitter noise injection for router exploration to balance exploitation/exploration trade-off during training.
raw_extraction.paper_title: Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces the Switch Transformer architecture, which replaces dense layers with sparse Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) layers, achieving efficient scaling to trillion-parameter models through adaptive expert routing.
raw_extraction.application: Pre-training large-scale language models, downstream reasoning and knowledge-heavy tasks (e.g., SuperGLUE, TriviaQA).
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scaling transformer models to trillion-parameter regimes while maintaining computational efficiency via sparsity.
raw_extraction.extension: Adaptive expert routing with load-balancing loss ensures diverse token distribution across experts, improving scalability.
raw_extraction.paper_title: Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity

raw_extraction.innovation: Extends Switch Transformer to larger model capacities by increasing the number of experts and model width, demonstrating improved scaling behavior in downstream tasks like TriviaQA.
raw_extraction.application: Pre-training large-scale language models, downstream reasoning and knowledge-heavy tasks (e.g., SuperGLUE, TriviaQA).
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scaling transformer models to trillion-parameter regimes while maintaining computational efficiency via sparsity.
raw_extraction.extension: Increased expert capacity and model width enhance expressiveness while retaining sparse computation.
raw_extraction.paper_title: Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity

raw_extraction.innovation: Further scales the Switch Transformer architecture to 50B parameters, emphasizing the trade-off between upstream perplexity and downstream performance, particularly on knowledge-heavy tasks.
raw_extraction.application: Pre-training large-scale language models, downstream reasoning and knowledge-heavy tasks (e.g., SuperGLUE, TriviaQA).
raw_extraction.research_problem: Evaluating the efficacy of sparse MoE architectures at massive scales for language modeling.
raw_extraction.extension: Load-balanced expert routing improves efficiency in large-scale settings, though challenges remain in translating upstream perplexity gains to downstream tasks.
raw_extraction.paper_title: Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces sparse mixture-of-experts (MoE) layers with 8 expert groups, enabling efficient scaling to trillion-parameter models through dynamic expert routing
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Not explicitly detailed in abstract but implied to be large-scale text corpora (likely similar to T5)
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose language modeling, sequence-to-sequence tasks, and large-scale NLP applications
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalability of deep transformer models to trillion-parameter regimes without proportional cost increases
raw_extraction.extension: Dynamic expert routing with load-balancing loss ensures balanced token distribution across experts while maintaining computational efficiency
raw_extraction.paper_title: Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces sparse mixture-of-experts (MoE) layers with 4 expert groups, demonstrating scalable sparsity patterns for efficient training
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Not explicitly detailed in abstract but implied to be large-scale text corpora (likely similar to T5)
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose language modeling, sequence-to-sequence tasks, and large-scale NLP applications
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalability of deep transformer models to trillion-parameter regimes without proportional cost increases
raw_extraction.extension: Dynamic expert routing with capacity factor adjustments optimizes resource utilization across varying workloads
raw_extraction.paper_title: Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces sparse mixture-of-experts (MoE) layers with 2 expert groups, showcasing minimalist sparsity configurations for efficient deployment
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Not explicitly detailed in abstract but implied to be large-scale text corpora (likely similar to T5)
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose language modeling, sequence-to-sequence tasks, and large-scale NLP applications
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalability of deep transformer models to trillion-parameter regimes without proportional cost increases
raw_extraction.extension: Load-balanced expert routing minimizes token overflow while preserving model accuracy
raw_extraction.paper_title: Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces sparse mixture-of-experts (MoE) layers with 1 expert group, serving as a baseline for evaluating scalability trade-offs
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Not explicitly detailed in abstract but implied to be large-scale text corpora (likely similar to T5)
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose language modeling, sequence-to-sequence tasks, and large-scale NLP applications
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalability of deep transformer models to trillion-parameter regimes without proportional cost increases
raw_extraction.extension: Minimalist expert configuration enables straightforward implementation and evaluation of MoE benefits
raw_extraction.paper_title: Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces a massive-scale sparse Mixture-of-Experts architecture with 128 expert groups, achieving trillion-parameter scale efficiently through dynamic routing
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Not explicitly detailed in abstract but implied to be large-scale text corpora (likely similar to T5)
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose language modeling, sequence-to-sequence tasks, and large-scale NLP applications
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalability of deep transformer models to trillion-parameter regimes without proportional cost increases
raw_extraction.extension: High-capacity expert networks combined with advanced load-balancing mechanisms support extreme model scaling
